seo.title: BetOnline Withdrawal Guide 2026 | Crypto, Wire & Check Limits
seo.description: Complete BetOnline.ag withdrawal breakdown — 15+ crypto options, bank wire, and check by courier. Fees, limits, processing times, and KYC requirements for 2026.

tax_reporting.notes: BetOnline does not issue W-2G or 1099 forms. US taxpayers must self-report all gambling winnings on Schedule 1 / Form 1040.

withdrawal_methods.pro_tip: BTC, ETH, and USDT offer the highest withdrawal limits ($500K). For fastest settlement, use Litecoin — near-zero network fees and sub-minute confirmations. Always withdraw to a non-custodial wallet first.
Cardano (ADA) has the highest altcoin limit at $25K. For smaller payouts, Solana and Stellar offer near-instant on-chain finality with minimal gas fees.
Intermediary bank fees of $15-$40 may apply on top of BetOnline's fee. Contact your bank to confirm they accept international wires from gaming operators.
Checks are drawn on foreign banks. Expect a 5-10 day hold at your US bank. This is the slowest and most expensive withdrawal method — crypto is strongly recommended.

verification.kyc_trigger: First withdrawal or upon account review
documents_needed: Utility bill or bank statement (proof of address)
Front/back of credit card (if used for deposit)
verification.pro_tip: Upload your KYC documents immediately after registration. BetOnline requires this before any withdrawal is processed — waiting until cashout time adds 24-48 hours of delay.

common_delays: Attempting withdrawal before 1x rollover on deposited funds
withdrawal_experience.rollover_rules: All deposited funds require a 1x rollover before withdrawal regardless of method. Withdrawing before completion incurs processing fees.
withdrawal_experience.cancellation_window: Withdrawal can be reversed while in 'Pending' status (typically 12-24 hours).

faqs.question: How many crypto withdrawal options does BetOnline have?
faqs.answer: BetOnline supports 17+ cryptocurrencies including Bitcoin, Ethereum, Litecoin, USDT, USDC, Cardano, Solana, XRP, Dogecoin, Avalanche, Binance Coin, Polygon, Stellar, Tron, Shiba Inu, and even memecoin TRUMP. All crypto withdrawals are free with a $20 minimum.

faqs.question: What is the maximum BetOnline withdrawal?
faqs.answer: Tier 1 cryptos (BTC, ETH, USDT, USDC, LTC, BCH) support up to $500,000 per withdrawal. Altcoins cap at $10,000-$25,000. Bank wire maxes at $25,000, and checks cap at $5,000.

faqs.question: Does BetOnline charge withdrawal fees?
faqs.answer: All cryptocurrency withdrawals are fee-free (you only pay blockchain network gas). Bank wires cost $45 to 3% plus potential intermediary bank fees. Check by courier is $50 flat.

faqs.question: Why is my BetOnline withdrawal pending?
faqs.answer: The most common causes are: incomplete KYC verification, not meeting the 1x rollover requirement on deposits, or the mandatory 3-day hold after credit card deposits (7 days for e-checks).
